svg.title: Quartermaster component architecture
svg.desc: Stripe sends a webhook to the droplet, verified by stripe.go, which enqueues a sign request. The signer machine, on a separate network with no inbound access, polls that queue over WireGuard, loads the private signing key that never leaves it, and posts the signed license back. The droplet emails the license via Resend. The customer app sends both activate and deactivate requests to the activations component.

g.text: Can verify and queue. Cannot sign.
Can sign. Never reachable from the internet.
